User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile document containing authentication status, licensing tier, and account creation time.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Authentication

premium.description: Flag indicating if user has active PRO subscription access

subscriptionId.description: Identifier linking to the active subscription document, or null if on free plan

createdAt.description: Firestore Server Timestamp of user registration

Manual.title: Technical Manual
Manual.description: Details, specifications, metadata and references to physical files for a technician service manual or diagram.

titulo.description: Display title of the technical manual

marca.description: Brand or manufacturer name (e.g. Brastemp, Electrolux)

categoria.description: Category name or ID (e.g. Washing Machines, Refrigerators)

descricao.description: Brief summary or instructions on what is covered in the manual

imagem.description: URL of the manual's cover image hosted in Firebase Storage

pdf.description: URL of the manual's PDF file hosted in Firebase Storage

premium.description: True if manual requires PRO membership or ad-unlock

downloads.description: Total number of times the manual has been downloaded

views.description: Total number of times the manual has been viewed

keywords.description: List of searchable keywords associated with this equipment

paginas.description: Total number of pages inside the PDF

tamanhoArquivo.description: Size of the PDF file in MB

createdAt.description: Firestore Server Timestamp of catalog listing creation

updatedAt.description: Firestore Server Timestamp of last modification

Favorite.title: Favorite Association
Favorite.description: A mapping indicating that a specific user has bookmarked/favorited a manual.

uid.description: ID of the user who favorited the manual

createdAt.description: Firestore Server Timestamp of bookmark event

History.title: Access History
History.description: Log of a manual being opened by a technician, tracking active progress.

readingTime.description: Estimated reading time spent in seconds

Download.title: Download Record
Download.description: Explicit track of user offline storage downloads of manuals.

device.description: User-agent or platform identifier for download context

Ad.title: Ad Watch Unlock
Ad.description: Temporary manual access credentials generated by watching rewarded ads.

manualId.description: Manual ID unlocked by this ad watch

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the access window expires (e.g. +24 hours)

Subscription.title: Billing Subscription
Subscription.description: Payment tier and billing status records synced from Stripe or app store provider.

plan.description: Subscription level name (e.g. Monthly PRO, Annual PRO)

status.description: Subscription state (e.g. active, canceled, trialing, past_due)

expiresAt.description: End date of paid term or grace period

autoRenew.description: Whether plan auto-renews at next billing cycle

Category.title: Manual Category
Category.description: Logical groupings of equipments like HVAC, Refrigerators, washing machines.

id.description: Slug-like category ID used in routing and filter states

nome.description: Localized name displayed in the UI

icone.description: Lucide icon or Google material symbol identifier

imagem.description: Rich category card background image URL

logo.description: Brand logo symbol image asset URL

/users/{userId}.description: Individual profile credentials and preferences indexed by Auth UID.

/manuals/{manualId}.description: Collection of all service catalogs, both base presets and custom user uploads.

/favorites/{favoriteId}.description: Global user favorites mappings tracking save bookmarks.

/history/{historyId}.description: Access tracking timeline logs measuring page progress.

/downloads/{downloadId}.description: Timeline metrics tracking equipment catalog downloads.

/ads/{adId}.description: Logs tracking ad-watched session keys with validity expiry timestamps.

/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}.description: Stripe/Store billing registers determining PRO availability status.
